name: HR payroll administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For HR payroll administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual payroll processing causes errors in tax filings. We automate tax filing instead of manual tax filing processes using spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR payroll administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Manual payroll processing leads to errors in tax filings.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual payroll processing leads to errors in tax filings.
